task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the record for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart is open, clearly displaying the name 'Jona Botsford' and DOB '1958-04-02' (or '02-Apr-1958').

task_completion.description: Verify the correct service is selected in the appointment scheduling interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment scheduling form, the Service field is filled with 'General Medicine'.

task_completion.description: Verify a valid future date within the next 30 days is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date picker or date field shows a selected date that is in the future but no more than 30 days ahead of the system's current date.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment duration is set to 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The duration field or time slot selection explicitly shows '30' minutes.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment type is set to 'Scheduled'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment type dropdown or radio button has 'Scheduled' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification/toast is visible, or the newly created appointment appears in the patient's 'Upcoming Appointments' list with the correct service and date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the OpenMRS Single Page Application (SPA) UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API requests, or SQL database insertions to create the appointment.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is happening in a real browser environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'http://localhost/openmrs/spa' and render the actual application styling, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Jona Botsford. Patient DOB: 1958-04-02. Expected Service: General Medicine. Date: Must be a future date within 30 days of the current system date. Duration: 30 minutes. Appointment Type: Scheduled.
